rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in component type scopes and implementation annexes in implementation scopes
Use only visible identifiers in AGREE expressions
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
generic_rules: Maintain architectural integrity when modifying AADL models
Validate scope consistency when inserting annex blocks
Preserve existing connections and subcomponents when adding annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Component type annexes contain assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
anti_patterns: Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not use implementation-only paths in component type annexes
